prompt: Create a hyper-realistic full-body fashion portrait of a stylish young man walking confidently along the peaceful shoreline of a calm lake during bright daytime. He is wearing black sunglasses, a loose sky-blue linen button-down shirt with the sleeves rolled up, off-white straight-fit trousers, and clean white sneakers. He is looking confidently to his left while walking forward with a relaxed, natural posture. The background features crystal-clear rippling lake water, a lush green tree line, and soft rolling hills in the distance beneath a slightly hazy blue sky. Warm natural daylight creates soft shadows and enhances the tranquil atmosphere. Capture realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, cinematic composition, ultra-sharp focus, vibrant natural colors, high dynamic range, professional fashion photography, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine style, 85mm lens, f/2.8, 8K ultra-HD quality, photorealistic, highly detailed. Aspect ratio 9:16.
promptEn: Create a hyper-realistic full-body fashion portrait of a stylish young man walking confidently along the peaceful shoreline of a calm lake during bright daytime. promptZh: 创作一张超写实的全身时尚人像，展现一位 时尚年轻男子 在明亮的白天，自信地走在 平静湖泊 的宁静岸边。他戴着黑色太阳镜，穿着一件 宽松天蓝色亚麻衬衫，袖子卷起，搭配米白色直筒裤和干净的白色运动鞋。他一边向前走，一边自信地看向左侧，姿态自然放松。背景是清澈见底的涟漪湖水、郁郁葱葱的树林，以及远处在微朦蓝天下的连绵起伏的丘陵。温暖的自然光营造出柔和的阴影，增强了宁静的氛围。捕捉逼真的皮肤质感、细微的织物褶皱、电影级构图、超清晰对焦、鲜艳的自然色彩、高动态范围、专业时尚摄影、浅景深、杂志编辑风格、85mm 镜头、f/2.8、8K 超高清画质、照片级真实感、高度细节。长宽比 9:16。
